instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `ensure-not-nil` that evaluates an expression once, signals an error if the value is nil, and otherwise returns the value.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (FIND-USER ID)))
            (WHEN (NULL #:G1) (ERROR "Expected non-nil value"))
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (FIND-USER ID)))
            (WHEN (NULL #:G112) (ERROR "Expected non-nil value"))
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
